steps.title: Count the number of doublings
steps.content: From 1663 to 1963 is $1963-1663=300$ years. With doubling every 75 years, the count is $\tfrac{300}{75}=4$ doublings.

steps.title: Solve for the initial population
steps.content: Let $P_0$ be the 1663 population. Then $P_0\cdot 2^4=240{,}000$. $$P_0=\frac{240{,}000}{16}=15{,}000.$$ The answer is 15000.
